name: Warranty Verification
description: Verifies product warranty status and initiates RMA or offers alternatives based on coverage.

nodes.content: Please provide your product serial number or order number so we can look up your warranty status.
Checking if the product is registered in our system...
We couldn't find that product in our system. Please double-check the serial/order number, or provide your proof of purchase so we can register it manually.
Verifying warranty coverage dates and terms...
Your warranty has expired. We can offer paid repair service or a discounted replacement. Which would you prefer?
Your warranty is active. Please describe the issue you're experiencing with the product.
Your product is covered under warranty. We are initiating the RMA process for you.
Your RMA request has been created. You will receive shipping instructions and a prepaid label via email within 1-2 business days.
A paid repair request has been submitted. Our service team will contact you with a quote and next steps within 2-3 business days.
A discounted replacement order has been initiated. You will receive a confirmation email with pricing and delivery details shortly.
Understood. If you change your mind or need further assistance, feel free to contact us anytime.
